ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a star graph?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'programming'}),
    p2 = (u:User {display_name: 'CypherMaster'})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Star Graph Basics'})-[r4:PROVIDED]->(u)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How has the programming tag influenced the structure and acceptance rate of answers to the question "How to build a star graph?" and what patterns emerge from users like CypherMaster’s contributions?

cypher: MATCH (q:Question {title: "How to build a star graph?"})<-[:TAGGED]-(t:Tag)<-[:TAGGED]-(otherQ:Question)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User)\nWHERE u.display_name STARTS WITH "CypherMaster"\nRETURN otherQ.title AS answerTitle, otherQ.acceptance_rate AS answerAcceptanceRate, t.name AS tagName
